name: AWS Cost Explorer MCP Server
what_it_does: AWS Cost Explorer MCP server enabling AI agents to query and analyze AWS cloud spending — retrieving cost and usage data by service, account, region, and time period; identifying cost anomalies; analyzing spending trends; and integrating AWS Cost Explorer capabilities into agent-driven FinOps and cloud cost optimization workflows.
use_cases: Querying AWS spending by service and time period from FinOps agents
Identifying cost anomalies and unexpected charges from cost monitoring agents
Analyzing reserved instance and savings plan coverage from optimization agents
Comparing spend across AWS accounts from multi-account management agents
Building cost attribution reports by tag from chargeback agents
Forecasting future AWS costs from budget planning agents
not_for: Teams not using AWS (use Azure Cost Management or GCP Billing MCPs)
Real-time cost alerts (use AWS Budgets or CloudWatch alarms for alerts)
Actual billing adjustments or payment management
best_when: An agent needs to analyze or report on AWS cloud spending — for FinOps, budget tracking, cost optimization recommendations, or chargeback reporting.
avoid_when: You're using Azure, GCP, or multi-cloud platforms — or if you need real-time cost alerts rather than historical analysis.

auth.notes: AWS IAM credentials (access key + secret, or IAM role). Requires ce:GetCostAndUsage, ce:GetCostForecast permissions. Read-only cost access — no billing modification permissions needed.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Cost Explorer API: $0.01 per API request (no free tier for API calls)
pricing.paid_tiers: $0.01/API request; Cost Explorer console access is free
pricing.notes: Cost Explorer API charges $0.01 per request — agents making many queries can incur costs. Console/UI is free but API is not. AWS account required.

performance.rate_limits: No documented rate limits; typically <5 requests/second recommended

known_agent_gotchas: Cost Explorer API charges $0.01/request — agents must not make excessive calls
Cost data has 24-48 hour delay — no real-time cost visibility
Time period granularity (DAILY vs MONTHLY) dramatically affects result set size
GroupBy dimensions must match available Cost Explorer dimensions
Cost allocation tags must be activated in AWS console before they appear in queries
Community MCP server — limited to cost query features; no budget or alert management
agent_readiness.security_notes: TLS via AWS SDK. IAM read-only cost permissions (ce:GetCostAndUsage, etc.). SOC2, ISO27001. Community MCP server. Use read-only IAM policy — no cost modification permissions needed. Be mindful of API call costs.

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS via AWS SDK. Read-only IAM permissions for Cost Explorer API. SOC2, ISO27001. Community MCP server. Use minimal read-only IAM policy. API calls cost $0.01 each — monitor usage.
